note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block.gridpoint module functions.

method_groups.disp: disp, disp_x, disp_y, disp_z, set_disp, set_disp_x, set_disp_y, set_disp_z
method_groups.force: force, force_app, force_app_x, force_app_y, force_app_z, force_inc, force_inc_x, force_inc_y, force_inc_z, force_reaction, force_reaction_x, force_reaction_y, force_reaction_z, force_unbal, force_unbal_x, force_unbal_y, force_unbal_z, set_force_app, set_force_app_x, set_force_app_y, set_force_app_z, set_force_inc, set_force_inc_x, set_force_inc_y, set_force_inc_z
method_groups.vel: set_vel, set_vel_app, set_vel_app_x, set_vel_app_y, set_vel_app_z, set_vel_x, set_vel_y, set_vel_z, vel, vel_app, vel_app_x, vel_app_y, vel_app_z, vel_x, vel_y, vel_z

methods.name: disp
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint force (vector).

methods.name: disp_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.name: disp_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.name: disp_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the gridpoint extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fblock
methods.description: Get the host face block for the gridpoint.

methods.name: flowknot
methods.description: Get the flowknot corresponding to this gridpoint.

methods.name: flux
methods.description: Get the thermal flux at the gridpoint.

methods.name: flux_app
methods.description: Get the applied thermal flux at the gridpoint.

methods.name: force
methods.description: Get the force vector.

methods.name: force_app
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint applied force (vector).

methods.name: force_app_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint applied force.

methods.name: force_app_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint applied force.

methods.name: force_app_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint applied force.

methods.name: force_inc
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint increment force (vector).

methods.name: force_inc_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint increment force.

methods.name: force_inc_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint increment force.

methods.name: force_inc_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint increment force.

methods.name: force_reaction
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint reaction force (vector).

methods.name: force_reaction_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint reaction force.

methods.name: force_reaction_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint reaction force.

methods.name: force_reaction_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint reaction force.

methods.name: force_unbal
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint unbalanced force (vector).

methods.name: force_unbal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: force_unbal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint unbalanced force.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the gridpoint group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: gridpoint.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the gridpoint. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this gridpoint is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: hostblock
methods.description: Get the block to which a gridpoint belongs.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the gridpoint id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: gridpoint.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the gridpoint is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the block gridpoint index (offset).

methods.name: mass
methods.description: Get the gridpoint mass.

methods.name: mass_dynamic
methods.description: Get the dynamic mass for the block gridpoint.

methods.name: mass_thermal
methods.description: Get the thermal mass.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the gridpoint gridpoint position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint position.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the gridpoint pore pressure.

methods.name: set_disp
methods.description: Set the gridpoint gridpoint force (vector).

methods.description: Set the x-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.description: Set the y-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.name: set_disp_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the gridpoint gridpoint force.

methods.description: Get the gridpoint temperature.
